# Soft adjectives — banned in execution-spec operational sections without
# a number within 30 chars. Consumed by tests/hooks/artifact-discipline.bats
# _check_soft_adjective_without_numeric. Referenced by output-discipline.md §7.1.
#
# Pruned 2026-04-26 from 30 → 10 — kept high-frequency unquantified-perf
# adjectives; dropped dual-purpose words ("clean", "heavy", "elegant"),
# semantic synonyms ("nimble", "swift", "zippy", "buttery", "silky", "crisp"),
# and rarely-used variants. The 10 that remain catch real specs-without-numbers
# regressions.
fast
slow
responsive
smooth
performant
snappy
sluggish
robust
scalable
intuitive
